input_text: Anna handed a key to Mark. The length of Emajogi is 80 kilometers. Penguins live in water. Americans cannot disappear. An old nice grey elephant was strong. The teacher showed the map to the students. John has finished his homework. Eve sent a letter to Tom. Estonia is not outside Europe. The mountain is higher than the hill. Gertrude is a cat. A coffee cup broke. The stone was heavy. Emily is a wolf. Mary visited London in September. The dog chased by the boy escaped. This book is more interesting than that one. Is the homework unfinished?
